channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Claude Code RCE Flaw Lets Attackers Execute Commands via Malicious Deeplinks - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
1. Claude Code RCE Flaw Lets Attackers Execute Commands via Malicious Deeplinks  CyberSecurityNews
  2. Running Claude Code or Claude in Chrome? Here's the audit matrix for every blind spot your security stack misses  Venturebeat
  3. Anthropic faces scrutiny over Claude's architectural flaws after multiple security disclosures in May 2026  Crypto Briefing
  4. Claude Code MCP Attack Enables Persistent Token Theft  eSecurity Planet
  5. Claude Chrome Extension Flaw Lets Malicious Extensions Steal Gmail and Google Drive Data  cyberpress.org

item.title: Former Microsoft VP says Microsoft missed the AI wave like the internet and mobile, as Copilot scales back in Windows 11 - Windows Latest
item.description:
1. Former Microsoft VP says Microsoft missed the AI wave like the internet and mobile, as Copilot scales back in Windows 11  Windows Latest
  2. Former Microsoft Executive Criticizes Company's AI Strategy Missteps: Repeating Mistakes from the Internet and Mobile Eras  富途牛牛
  3. Microsoft struggles with user backlash over AI  Texas Standard
  4. What To Do When Your AI’s Guardrails Fail  Information Security Buzz
  5. Ex-Microsoft Executive Says Copilot Adoption Is Far Lower Than Expected  Windows Report

item.title: ARC Raiders' World Is About To Get Much Bigger - ScreenRant
item.description:
1. ARC Raiders' World Is About To Get Much Bigger  ScreenRant
  2. Changes to the ARC Raiders update schedule  ARC Raiders
  3. ‘Arc Raiders’ Is Getting Its Biggest Map Yet, But There’s A Catch  Forbes
  4. Arc Raiders' Next Big Update Isn't Coming Until October, And That Might Be A Good Thing  GameSpot
  5. ARC Raiders’ First New Trader Since Launch is Coming Next Week  Insider Gaming
